programs.programName: Medi-Cal Medicare Savings Programs (QMB, SLMB, QI)

verified.notes: Multiple income limits by program (QMB, SLMB, QI); no single value and no 2026 income from authoritative sources. Assets from CA source effective Jan 1 2026. No phone found.

programs.notes: Multiple income limits by program (QMB, SLMB, QI); no single value and no 2026 income from authoritative sources. Assets from CA source effective Jan 1 2026. No phone found.

verified.notes: No asset or income limits found in sources; program requires Medi-Cal enrollment and nursing facility level of care. Age lowered to 60 in 2024 waiver renewal (active through 2029).

programs.notes: No asset or income limits found in sources; program requires Medi-Cal enrollment and nursing facility level of care. Age lowered to 60 in 2024 waiver renewal (active through 2029).

programs.programName: Multipurpose Senior Services Program (MSSP) Caregiver Support

verified.notes: No statewide application phone; contact local providers. Eligibility tied to Medi-Cal (no separate income/assets tests specified). Some providers list 65+ but official state sources confirm 60+.

programs.notes: No statewide application phone; contact local providers. Eligibility tied to Medi-Cal (no separate income/assets tests specified). Some providers list 65+ but official state sources confirm 60+.

verified.notes: SSP is a supplement to federal SSI; eligibility including age and assets determined by federal SSI rules. No SSP-specific asset test found; used SSI asset limits. No official phone or income max (means-tested) in results.

verified.notes: No assets test; income is household limit for 2025-2026 based on 2024 income

verified.notes: Search results confirm IHSS is active in 2026 with eligibility changes, but do not contain specific numeric values for income limits, asset limits, or official application phone numbers. Results indicate income thresholds exist and were updated for 2026 cost-of-living adjustments, and that applicants must meet Medi-Cal eligibility, but exact dollar amounts are not provided. Official CDSS and county DPSS websites (referenced in results) would contain these values, but the actual pages with numeric thresholds were not included in search results. Recommend consulting https://www.cdss.ca.gov/in-home-supportive-services or your county IHSS office directly for current limits.

programs.notes: Search results confirm IHSS is active in 2026 with eligibility changes, but do not contain specific numeric values for income limits, asset limits, or official application phone numbers. Results indicate income thresholds exist and were updated for 2026 cost-of-living adjustments, and that applicants must meet Medi-Cal eligibility, but exact dollar amounts are not provided. Official CDSS and county DPSS websites (referenced in results) would contain these values, but the actual pages with numeric thresholds were not included in search results. Recommend consulting https://www.cdss.ca.gov/in-home-supportive-services or your county IHSS office directly for current limits.
